review_text:
Very disappointed for the money. Cant even have a wee before you shower without getting your stuff flogged.
Grubs across the road get in and out even with the codes.
Blocked drains in laundry/ bathroom which spills out onto the road.
Housekeeping Hmmmm. Walking in flush toilets walk out. Filthiest facilities I’ve ever been in. Showers have never been cleaned from scum, hair dye, hair to mould.

Male shower block did not lock. Two shower stalls out of order. Laundry drain was blocked and spilled out of the driveway. Toiletries stolen from female toilet. Generally just dirty.

Gets 1 star because the sites were easy to access.

Bit expensive for an powered site. Right across the road from the park and beach. Clean amenities and good camp kitchen. Pool, tennis court (didn't use). Pet unleaded friendly. I had a nice stay as fellow campers where friendly.
Disappointing to see that they don't want to refund for medical issue.

The campsite is well located, but the individual sites are quite small. The pool was clean, which was a plus.

The toilets and showers were partly clean, however there were huge numbers of sandflies—it was almost unbearable.

The owner is aware of the problem but does very little to address it.

->>> I wouldn’t stay here again.
It's horrible, they don't have a bathroom, you have to walk a lot to make you urinate, it smells horrible, it's really very unpleasant and expensive, the worst I've seen in Australia. Horrible.

Clean facilities, friendly staff, good kitchen.
Directly located at the beach with a nice walking way.
lovely park, huge sites and very peaceful, we felt very safe and no sign of crime.
Very nice place staff went over and above great place to stay thanks for all your help 😘
Perfect location, friendly and helpful staff, neat clean and up dated cabins, camp kitchen and toilets, extremely happy with our stay.
So for the cost of the room you may as well stay in a hotel. Also don't forget to bring your towels and cleaning equipment.

I tried to get 2 parcels redirected from the team as I use to live here and was greeted with unprofessionalism and someone who doesn't seem like they want to do their job, didnt introduce herself and already had an attitude with me before she called me. ( I waited 2 weeks for no reply on email, only getting a reply after following up multiple times. Terrible phone service I can only imagine what its like in person.

I accidentally booked a standard cabin (shared bathroom). In small print it said shared bathroom my fault as I didn't read it properly. Asked to pay for a different room fully booked. Understandable.
But.. their was ants in the beds. The fire alarm wasn't even plugged in, no hot water in the kitchen sink area. The cooking equipment was not washed properly as it still had food on the pans. A drinking glass smelt like an ashtray. It was hard to lock the glass door.
Only good thing about the cabin the air-conditioning was cold.
was such a lovely stay! and molly from reception was soooooo helpful🫶🏼💕

We had a wonderful stay at this caravan park. The views were absolutely beautiful, and the location made it easy to access all the main places we were heading to. The management team were incredibly accommodating throughout our stay, and the receptionist, Molly, was especially welcoming and friendly. We would happily stay here again.

Beautiful location perfect walking distance to the strand and city. Amenities are on the older side but kept well and appeared to be cleaned every day. Reception and staff around the park were all lovely and super accommodating. I would recommend some renovations in cabins and amenities but as a whole a beautiful park and will return.

Guys, seriously, don’t come here no matter what.
The toilets are ABSOLUTELY DISGUSTING! 🤢
I’ve attached a video but it really don’t show the worse reality. It was both male and female toilet, because me and my wife decided after 20 seconds we prefer not taking a shower. We went to another showers in the park, which was bad but Less than this one (which felt like a fear factor task).
Okay, so the kitchen is nice and the park generally looks okay, but if the amenities are full of bugs , flies and etc (even inside the actual toilet!), then what’s  the point?
Worst camp in our 2 months trip, and trust me we are easy to keep pleased. Would never return there

I had a terrible experience. It was a horrible place, full of insects and flies that bit you everywhere. It was poorly maintained, and a large branch fell and almost hit my car. The problem was that they didn't come to remove it right away. After two days, the manager, a rude person, knew I was a customer, and he rudely responded to me and decided to kick me out for no reason. It was a terrible experience. I wouldn't recommend it to anyone.

Staff were great, let me check in early after a long drive. We hired a beach front 2 bedroom villa. I have a high sensitivity to dust mites and in already 2 hours, I have hives on my legs and body from having a lie down on couch, even using my own blankets from home. I decided to take a shower to relieve itching the shower floods half of the bathroom with in 2 minutes. Beautiful spot, great location, but my itching body tells me there are a lot of dust mites in here- going to be a long itchy weekend lol

Rooftent, 2 personnes.
Quand nous sommes arrivées sur notre emplacement, il y avait des grosses poubelles, placées à 2m de là où on pouvait mettre notre voiture. Des déchets sur notre emplacement. Une honte de proposer cela aux voyageurs.
Petite suggestion : les sanitaires pourraient ne pas avoir de code car grosse concentrations de bestioles la nuit juste au dessus de la porte et donc, tout le monde se depeche de rentrer et claque la porte.
Cuisine très bien, wifi également.
Personnel très aimable et qui nous a proposé un autre site quand on a signalé le probleme.
Lovely park with clean amenities! The staff are so lovely and helpful. Definitely recommend as they are very accommodating.

We rented a powered site for our RV. The site had huge potholes. Toilets and showers were quite run down. The cleanliness was OK. But bad value for money as this park is more expensive than the ones around we expected more.

very ran down facilities. Potholes in our parking lot. Dirty picnic tables at the BBQ area.
We expected much more from Tasman because those campsites are usually the most expensive ones. Lesson learned: stick with the tiny campsites which are well taken care of instead of the big brand.

We were on several campsites in New Zealand a few weeks ago and the standards were much higher. Maybe the campsite standard is generally higher there, I don‘t know.
Shower facilities in NZ had A/C, fans and even hairdryers. That‘s why we maybe expected a much better service and better facilities from Tasman here in Aussie.

It would also be great if they could re-invest some of the profits into the roads and parking lots in the campsite to remove the potholes etc.

If you value your money, cleanliness, basic hygiene, or even halfway decent customer service — do not book here.

We originally booked a powered site for our van. On arrival, we were directed to what can only be described as a waterlogged patch of muddy grass. After recent rain, it was completely unusable. We returned to reception and asked if there were alternatives. Thankfully, there were other sites available, and we were moved.

Unfortunately, the second site wasn’t much better — overgrown, flooded, and miles from any amenities. Again, we had to go back to reception to explain that it simply wasn’t suitable. We asked to upgrade to an “evergreen” site. The only positive interaction of our entire stay was with the young woman at reception who helped us move again.

But even then, the overall condition of the park was incredibly disappointing.

The toilets were dirty, with no sign they’d been cleaned in some time. The shower cubicles were so filthy you genuinely felt cleaner before stepping inside. The kitchen area was no better — the BBQs didn’t work, and the entire space flooded when it rained.

After the first night brought extremely heavy rain, we decided to upgrade to one of the cabins for a couple of nights. This turned out to be a huge mistake.

At first glance, the cabin seemed acceptable. That illusion didn’t last long. The place was infested with ants — not a few here and there, but hundreds. They were covering the kitchen worktops, inside cupboards, in the fridge, and crawling over cooking utensils. It was like staying inside an ant nest.

The bed and sofa were just as bad. Both my partner and I woke up covered in bites.

After a sleepless night, we decided we couldn’t stay. We understood we had used the room for one night and weren’t asking for a refund for that. However, given the condition of the cabin, we expected the basic decency of being refunded for the second night.

This was flatly refused.

The customer service we experienced was, without exaggeration, the worst I have ever encountered. The man in the office was dismissive and condescending, speaking to me as though I were a child. At one point he actually said, “What do you expect from North Queensland?” and insisted there was nothing wrong with the room — despite also acknowledging there was likely an ants’ nest inside it.

We paid $300 to stay in what was essentially an insect infestation.

For context, I have travelled extensively through South East Asia, staying in beach shacks and very basic accommodation — and none of it came close to being this unpleasant.

Dirty facilities. Flooded sites. Broken amenities. An ant-infested cabin. And abysmal customer service to top it off.

Save yourself the money, frustration, and sheer disbelief.

Book literally anywhere else.

Booked for 2 nights and unfortunately the highway flooded and we were unable to get to Townsville. Called Booking.com who said it was Tasman’s call if they would credit or refund us. We were a returning customer until now! They refused everything! So we will never stay there again! They blamed Booking.com but this is not the case!
Lots of shade, pool, clean restrooms and a great bbg section

Disgraceful. Unhygienic. Dismissive staff. Do NOT waste your money here.

This was genuinely one of the worst accommodation experiences we have ever had — and we are travelling Australia full-time in a campervan, so we are not high-maintenance guests.

When we arrived at Big 4 Tasman Holiday Park in Townsville, the first pitch we were allocated was nothing more than a waterlogged, muddy patch of grass. Completely unsuitable for a campervan. After raising this, we were moved — only to be placed on another poor-quality pitch that was barely any better. It took THREE moves before we were finally placed on an astro-turf site that didn’t even resemble a proper pitch.

After heavy rain the following morning, we decided to upgrade to a cabin for two nights as a bit of comfort. We paid over $300 AUD (and were told this was “discounted”). What we walked into was unacceptable.

The cabin had ants everywhere. Not the odd insect — an infestation. They were across surfaces and got into our sealed food. When we reported this to reception first thing in the morning, the response was unbelievably dismissive: “It’s North Queensland, that’s how it is.” We were told they were aware there were ants and that it was essentially our fault for leaving sealed food out.

Sealed food.

That level of response says everything about the standards here.

To make matters worse, we woke up covered in bites after a night of feeling like our skin was crawling. Whether it was bed bugs or something else, the cleanliness and condition of the bedding did not feel hygienic. We didn’t feel comfortable using the shower or even the towels provided. We got no sleep.

We immediately requested a refund for the second night (we only stayed one) and were met with complete indifference.

The general amenities around the park were also poorly maintained and unclean.

This place charges premium prices but delivers substandard, unhygienic accommodation and shockingly poor customer service. The attitude from staff was by far the most concerning part — problems are normal in hospitality, but dismissing guests and normalising infestations is not.

If you value your comfort, hygiene, or basic customer service — stay elsewhere.

Read the negative reviews. They are accurate.

Nice clean room (Ensuite villa) comfortable with most things a person requires to cook and tidy up.
The staff were amazing,I had to get surgery in Townsville and they gave me a quite and comfortable location to relax and heal.
I can't thank you guys enough,especially the office person trasell who went out of her way to make sure things were quite and comfortable after my surgery,also that I had enough towels and bed linen etc as not to be disturbed in the first week thankyou, It was very appreciated,you are an amazing kind person,its the little things like this with a smile and great attitude towards customers that business these days seem to lack,I hope your employer values this as I will return again,can I add,a shout out to the cleaners and maintenance lawn ppl,for avoiding making noise first couple days out of surgery,I understand you guys still have a tough job to do in the heat here in Townsville,just want to also say a big thankyou to you guys as well,shout ya a cold one after work next next time.
What an amazing location 😀 keep up the good work guys you are appreciated,will see yall again soon.come visit this beautiful place ❤️
Q.

Teníamos una reserva con ellos de una noche y les contactamos porque debido a unas inundaciones tuvimos la carretera cerrada y no pudimos llegar al camping. No obtuvimos ninguna respuesta por su parte

Nice camping the spot are on a grassy surface witch is nice. Not much shade on our side but ok. The amenities are good. Hot showers and pressure. The pool is super except the children that jump on your head but that’s another subject 😊 in front of a beach. No swimming I recommend

Great location. Friendly staff. Well laid out park with a good selection of sites and cabins.  Only thing to be mindful of from our experience is sand flies early in the morning and late in the afternoon.  We didn't have issues with them at night or during the day though.  Plenty of activities close by.  Beach across the road and pathways that will get you all the way into town if you like walks.
Muy buen camping. Los vestuarios, piscina y barbacoa en buen estado y limpios.
Tasman holiday park is an amazing place to stay , with awesome views and plenty to do.

Very disappointing stay. The park was dirty and poorly maintained, with cockroaches everywhere in the accommodation. It was uncomfortable and unhygienic, especially for a family stay. For the price we paid, we expected a much higher standard of cleanliness and care. Unfortunately, it was not worth the money at all and we would not stay here again or recommend it to others

Very disappointing stay. The park was extremely dirty — far below the standard you expect from a BIG4. Facilities were poorly maintained and several didn’t work at all, which completely ruined the experience.

Customer service was just as bad. Staff were unhelpful and dismissive when issues were raised, and there was no real attempt to fix anything or offer a solution. It felt like complaints were simply ignored.

For the price charged, this place is not worth it. The photos and reputation do not match the reality. I have photos to back up the condition of the facilities and cleanliness.

Would not recommend and definitely won’t be returning.
Lots of midgees, location is great though. Ask for a shady site.
Beautiful clean park, great management, had the best time, will definitely be back.

Nette camping. Alles is opgeruimd.  Netjes en onderhouden.
Lekker zwembadje erbij.
Of voor diegene die nog even de oceaan in wilt kan dat ook nog doen.
Met een mooi park aan de andere kant van de straat.

Wel jammer dat er af en toe een vliegtuig rond vliegt.

This is a beautifully located campground with friendly, helpful staff. It is right next to the amazing South Mission Beach which has a swimming area in a stinger net and a lovely walk at the south end. There is very little in the way of retail outlets in the immediate area (which was part of the attraction for us) but Mission Beach is only a few miles away and that has a supermarket and other shops. The campsite has a family of cassowaries which wander around looking for food, another big plus for us.

Booked a powered site for 6 nights at the Tasmania big 4 caravan park at Rowes Bay. Night 3  our caravan was broken into and our keys taken and our Ute was stolen from the site. The entrance of the park had 3 boom gates. One we booked on and it was open the whole time we were there and even after the theft. The other needed a PIN number to enter? The other the exit boom gate just had to drive up to and it would open. At the back of the park there was a set of double gates which was also open and that is were our Ute was taken out of. There was a house at the back that found some of our property thrown from our Ute and then sped off. The park has 17 cctv cameras and not one picked up anything. The make manager had no empathy and we were even told the site we were on was booked the following Thursday and we will need to get our van off there, but we can store it down the back for free. We had some more belongings thrown out of the Ute about 15 minutes away and also picked up by someone who rang us since there was a lot of paperwork with our belongings after being on the road for 2 moths. My wife asked if he could give us a lift to pick it up. We had to wait until he had time. He has said since as a goodwill gesture he helped. Notwithstanding our we had our van broken into while we were asleep and the Ute stolen from his park. The management didn’t care and after talking to others in the park , there has been a lot of break ins and car stealing from this incompetent park. Why have boom gates and cameras if you are not going to use them. I would not recommend this park. Dangerous. There was a knife left in our annex by the thieves. Later caught after more than 10 break ins with our vehicle. Just read the reviews on FB. Arrogant and abusive.

The room that was given was far reaching the basic standard to accommodate.||The wall near the bunk bed was damaged and it was not painted . The electricity power point not working well. The switch button for the fan dropped off , the bedside lamp broke off . The hot water kettle was so dirty that it is beyond usable and it is doubtful for its hygiene standard . See photo for all the defects .||I don’t think it foot the bill of BiG4 Camper van park standard .||The service staff argued that the room rate charged was low that was why I could expect this catogory of room . He mentioned that if I want a better room I need to pay more . ||This is ridiculous . The room was not even clean and tidy and comfortable for our stay . To pay A$368 for two nights to get this sort of room and standard it is totally unacceptable .||Personally I also don’t appreciate the service staff ‘s argument. ||I would expect a minimum liveable  standard be given for our stay .

We stayed in an Ocean Villa at the Tasman Holiday Park Rowes Bay and had an absolutely fantastic time. The check-in staff were first-class – very friendly, attentive, and full of helpful tips for nearby attractions in Townsville. We especially recommend visiting “Little and Big Creek” – a beautiful experience!

We will definitely be back. 🌴✨
We have been regularly staying here for the last 5 years with work. The team here have always been accommodating and the location and rooms are fantastic

Prima camping ⛺️ op een ideale plek. Sanitair wat verouderd. Alleen zijn beide schoenen bij ons gestolen in de nacht. Dus alles zoveel mogelijk naar binnen halen. Misschien handig om vanuit de receptie dit aan te geven bij de gasten, aangezien je meerdere soortgelijke reacties ziet.
Pratique pour une nuit mais équipements vétustes

This Holiday Park whether for a short visit or long visit, work or play, is the best Park I have ever stayed at before. The staff are the best and the amenities by far the cleanest and well maintained. Just over the road is the servicemans memorial park and right on the beach.
I will recommend to all this is a must place to stay when in Townsville. Cannot wait to return.
Brad

It was a very bad experience.
I thought the price was very expensive for what they offer. The price varies depending on the day, and even they aren't clear about how much it costs.
The man at reception was very rude and even disrespectful.

The bathrooms were a disaster, usually dirty, and there was no hot water in the showers. They have very large bathrooms with many showers, but they are unusable because the water is cold. This didn't just happen to me; from shower to shower, we guests asked each other if we had hot water, and at different times of the day. I went at midday, in the afternoon and at night, and it was always the same problem. The only bathroom with hot water is the one next to the pool. It's the smallest and most neglected.
The toilet paper is of very poor quality.

The covered kitchen was generally dirty and full of flies. It is very small for the number of guests it has, and the refrigerator they have is not big enough; it does not even reach the temperature it should for the amount of food it holds. They should definitely add another refrigerator.
I have even had food go missing that I left in the refrigerator.
We have found people sleeping on the sofas in the kitchen.

The other outdoor kitchen is full of mosquitoes, and I had a terrible time. I had dinner there one night and woke up the next day covered in bites. They should fumigate more often or find a solution so that guests don't have this problem.

The place has poor security. The entrance gate hardly ever worked.

The site without electricity that they gave us was very uneven, it wasn't level, which made it very uncomfortable to be in a tent.

The water in the pool was very cold. You can't enjoy it.

The only good thing about it is the location.

We stayed in a cabin, I got bitten by bedbugs and once notified them they just said they would pass on the message also emailed and never heard a response.
The pool and BBQ was nice and clean daily, the location is great.
But rooms wherent cleaned properly before arrival, also then getting bitten by bed bugs and not having a acknowledgement or respond back was disappointing.
To expensive $40 pernight for an unpowered tent site

Feedback About Our Recent Stay at Tasman Holiday Park Townsville

We recently stayed on a Small Powered Campervan Site with our small dogs and overall had a very pleasant experience. The site itself was great and well-suited to our needs.

However, the toilet and shower block could benefit from some improvements. A new epoxy floor coating would greatly enhance hygiene, and several of the door locks and handles need attention. A fresh coat of paint would also help give the facilities a cleaner, more inviting appearance.

We also booked a Standard Cabin, and unfortunately this part of our stay was disappointing. The cabin was not clean and the air-conditioner was extremely loud, resulting in very little sleep for my wife and the kids. Considering the condition of the cabin, we felt the price was far too high for the standard provided.

We hope this feedback is helpful, as we would love to see these issues addressed for future guests.

We stayed 5 nights in a tent in this campsite and we had food and drinks stolen 2 nights in a row. A couple was forced into their motorhome during the night. The lady at the reception told me that it was surely homeless ppl who venture into the kitchens at night. There is CLEARLY a lack of security in this campsite.
The fridge is filled to the bord, difficult to find a place. However, the kitchen is very good, equipped with air conditioning, a TV, an oven, hobs and very clean. The showers were not really clean more precisely the floor of the showers but it was fine. A little unpleasant smell in the evening, we don't know what.
Weird smell in campsite, amenities are clean and well maintained. Mosquitoes are a huge problem.

Prima camping, campingplaatsen voldoende ruimte.
Personeel zeer vriendelijk.
De weg oversteken en je bent bij zee waar maar een klein strand is.
Great spot across the road from a nice beach. Very well located in Townsville and half hour walk along the path to the Strand. Park is nicely maintained with some shady sites for vans.

Highly recommend very tidy park customer service is great room had an ensuite and kitchenette aircon worked well we felt location was great for us will stay there again food vans set up Accross the street in a he afternoon serving pizza and coffee van in the morning

Clean facilities and good pitches
Shade available
Bit further out of town than we thought but great walk on

In some instances 1 star is too many for this stay. We stayed from the 28th October until the 1st of November in cabin A02 , our cabin was a huge let down from filthy toilet brush that literally smelled to bed bugs that left bites all over us. The cabin only had 1 blanket for a 4 person booking. The stovetop didn’t not work and no cooking utensils were provided anyway. Ants gallon, it was impossible to keep them away they took over the whole space. Staff were totally disinterested , did not provide further bedding we had to go buy it and didn’t care about the bites either, yet I am fully aware we were not the only people to raise this concern during our visit. Emails are totally ignored. It seems once they have your money the quality of your stay doesn’t count. This experience and lack of follow through is so disappointing that it’s time to complain further outside of the company and review panel.

When we were looking for a park, we specifically picked this because it was by the ocean AND had a pool. I rang and booked and paid for 2 nights. However, on arrival were told that the pool was out of action. While the staff were curtious, at no stage during my booking was this mentioned, thereby giving us the option to choose somewhere else. Having been a business owner I find this behaviour very poor and deceitful business practice  in this regard. I also note, while an apology was given, there was no offer of reduction of fee to compensate for the lack of advertised facilities. Apart from that, it is a lovely location.

Had a really lovely stay here. Ayden you were always a joy to deal with on reception as were the rest of the team.  We will be back.
Busy park, nice pool area, very clean amenities.
Thank you.

DON'T FALL for the "stay one extra night at a cheap price sms". We replied to this sms that we indeed want to stay an extra night, but when we checked the next day by calling, it was all of a sudden 10 dollars more and they did not know of anything. When replying that this does not feel really fair, I was told to find another campsite (which was not an option for us anymore). Apart from this friendly bloke on the other side of the phone, the staff was really friendly and the facilities on point.

Worth the stay. Great location straight across from the beach and not far from the main waterfront. We stayed two nights on different dates. The first night we stayed in the standard studio cabin (shared bathroom). This cabin was pleasant surprise. Although we didn't have a ensuite, the large room with bunkbeds made the kids happy. The second night when we stayed in the ensuite studio, I had one issue with this room, the blinds didn't line up properly and the sun in the morning was really bright hitting the pillow I was laying on so there was no chance of sleeping in. Both rooms were very clean. I did however have an issue with trying to get into the shared bathroom, on the fourth go putting in the code I managed to get in the bathroom, not good if you are urgently needing to go to the bathroom like I was that night. Staff were helpful. Both times was easy to check in. There are many accommodation options suitable for your budget. We will definitely be staying here again.

Stayed on a “premium evergreen site” which was fake grass. There were no trees or shade which made the astroturf to hot to walk on without shoes and the van HOT!  The park is also beside a creek so sandflies were relentless!!  Probably won’t stay here again.

The location of this caravan park is fantastic, with the beach just across the road and close proximity to the city and essential amenities. In the past, our stays here have been wonderful, making it a place with great potential.

There has clearly been a significant decline or change in management. The accommodation was dirty, with thick dust, old rubbish, and used soap found under the beds. The dishes that were in the cabin had dried food still on them and required cleaning before we could use them. The bbq was still uncleaned after its last use and was caked with grease and burnt food. Marks and stains on the walls in the toilet clearly showing they had not been wiped over prior to our stay. An employee aggressively approached our vehicle with a leaf blower after we mistakenly entered through the boom gate due to poor signage. Additionally, the reception staff were unhelpful and dismissive.

The dismissive attitude of the staff was a significant issue during our stay. On multiple occasions, we encountered a complete lack of engagement and a general unwillingness to assist guests. When my children approached the reception to inquire about renting fishing rods and tennis racquets, the staff member didn't even bother to look up from her phone, providing a curt "uh no" before returning to her screen, effectively ignoring them. Although the booking was booked for 6 guests there were only 4 towels in the cabin and when additional towels were requested they advised that there was none available until the following morning after laundry had been done. No apology or care was shown at the inconvenience of this nor were additional towels bought to us when they had said they were available and when we enquired again, we were met with dismissive responses and a clear unwillingness to help.

Furthermore, our requests for a late checkout and to extend our stay were handled with similar indifference. Despite the park appearing to have available spots online and over the phone, we were told the park was fully booked and that we needed to leave promptly. This lack of flexibility and the dismissive manner in which these requests were handled left us feeling undervalued and unimportant as guests. It was clear that the staff were either poorly trained or simply did not prioritize customer service, which significantly detracted from our overall experience at the park.
Very clean and quiet
If you get allocated sure D12 ask to change. There is no shade and a street light will shine in your van window all night.

I recently stayed here for few days and was happy with the whole experience. Great customer service, spacious comfortable accommodation. Fantastic location along the beach. A added bonus were the pop up food trucks, there was a pizza truck in the evening and a coffee truck in the morning, super convenient because the nearest convenient store is quiet a walk from the Big4 park.
Well organized, clean, quite, allp amenities are very good.

We were switched into a different cabin with a bedding configuration which didn't suit us without being notified! They couldn't change it back as they were booked out! This put a massive dampener on our holiday as my daughter had to stay somewhere else in Townsville!  I was told we would be given a double upgrade to a villa for the second night as there was plenty of availability. Nope! We were just put into the original cabin I booked!! Was not happy!!!

Unfortunately when we were going to bed we noticed that there was no top sheet on the any of the beds. Plus no cover.  Ended up with a blanket that was in the closet.  Very disappointed after a long day driving.  Called today and informed them.  Receptionist said she had , had another complaint regarding same issue.
very busy, no privacy between sites, really enjoyed the dump point, onky been here 5 mins google, give us a chance !
All good
Het rook er soms erg vies, waar het vandaan kwam weet ik niet maar de achterburen hadden de grijs waterslang gewoon op de grond liggen, het vuile water liep zo onder de camper...

We stayed in an ocean view deluxe 2 bedroom villa, which was beautiful and clean. They turned our aircon on prior to our arrival and on such a hot day was very much appreciated.
The guys at the front desk when we arrived are absolutely lovely and welcoming, more than happy to answer my random questions and have a laugh.
All the staff here are amazing, happy to help and nothing is ever a drama, the team are always around cleaning the park, amenities  were immaculate as was the pool and BBQ areas.
There is a well equipped little convenience shop  located at the office.
Right across the road from the water and kids park which most mornings has a food truck doing coffees and bagels.
Amazing park, Amazing location and an Amazing team.
Thank you our stay was great and we look forward to stopping in again in the near future ☺️
Great location, close to everything, electric scooters always out the front, pool, tennis court, BBQs, cabins were clean, great family spot, for what it is and location I give it ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐
The staff have been amazing, the place was very tidy and cosy. Beautiful views from the deluxe cabins have overall enjoyed my stay and the kids have enjoyed the pool.
Great, Seen couple of bad reviews which made me hesitate to book. But was absolutely great, clean facilities and close to strand.

Great family spot, we stayed in the 3 bdrm sea view unit. Fully self-contained with the bonus of washing machine and dryer in the unit. & all the fun facilities for the children, swimming pool, tennis, basketball & a giant chessboard. We would definitely stay here again

I unfortunately have been reduced to leaving a review now after no response to emails. We stayed here at the start of September for 2 nights. On arrival we checked into cabin A18 I believe (closest to the toilet block), it was already dark so we were desperate to get inside and get to sleep. When we opened the door to the cabin it smelled absolutely horrible of urine and poo. We thought maybe it was just because it was just closed up, or the drains, so carried on. Through the night my 2 children, husband and I started to feel sick, but again weren’t too worried. The next morning we woke up and saw that right outside our bedroom window, the sewer overflow gully had popped open and leaked sewerage, visible poo and toilet paper/baby wipes absolutely everywhere. Including on the path where we were walking to access the cabin. We immediately notified reception who were quick to call a plumber in to fix this, however when we returned back to the cabin again that afternoon, yes the lid and majority of the mess was cleaned up, but where was still a lot of toilet paper etc everywhere. The smell was still there aswell. We were never offered to move cabins, and considering this is a major health and safety concern in my opinion, I would think atleast one nights refund would be fair. We paid the same as every other guest, yet we had to spend our stay breathing in the disgusting mess outside of our cabin. 3 weeks later and no response still to my email requesting at the very least a partial refund. It’s very unfortunate as the park otherwise is great. The location is great. I’m sad that we had a bad experience as we came all the way from the Sunshine Coast.

Sites 17 and 18 should not exist!
It's a shame.
Uneven sites just next to the toilets and dump point.
Toilet music all night long and people coming to the dump point for breakfast: terrible stay !
tremendous smell of urine on my campsite. neigbour is flushing his chemical toilet onto our lot.

I do not recommend this campsite. We had booked a powered site, and the spots were supposed to be staggered to respect everyone’s privacy. When we arrived, we noticed that our neighbors already had three tents set up. To access the power outlet, we had to walk through their tents, dirty dishes, trash, and other storage items, which was very uncomfortable and inconvenient. They seems to live here long term. Later in the evening, three more cars parked on the site in addition to the one already there, so instead of being face to face, we ended up side by side. This made the power access even less practical. We decided to call the campsite because we didn’t feel comfortable and knew it was going to be noisy at 9:30 pm. We did not appreciate having to change sites so late in the evening, nor the fact that we had been placed right next to them in the first place. Even though we were given a better spot afterwards, the evening was already disrupted and it left us with no desire to stay longer. Finally we received a poor customer service and very little consideration on our experience from the reception.

Stayed for 2 nights on a van site that had a concrete pad, not always a fan of the slab sites. Clean ablution block, key pad numbers very hard to read on the mens door.
Peaceful place just lock everything up for piece of mind.
Little bit pricey at $85 per night, still a nice place to stay

We stayed 3 nights. They put us next to a permanent hut with rubbish and it looked like the garden hadn’t been touched for months. For $70 a night you would think you’d get a better view. Clean up or put up a fence.
Great location and amenities for families. Clean rooms. A park, pool and a walking path all the way through to the strand.

Lovely site & great location!! BEST kitchen facilities yet !!! Lovely showers (female and male block which was lovely). Toilets were coded which felt very safe as a female. 10/10 for cleanliness throughout.
Only thing is that our first site was extremely small/ tight to drive into (not the end of the world).

The caravan park is located cross the road from the beach. The amenities were ok. Kitchen pretty new and plenty of space.
Laundry $6 a load.
The kitchen and bbq area were close, but toilets and showers were far, bit of walk in the night (in the dark, not much lights at all) when i need toilet.
Our camp site was not really suitable for a tent,very uneven and no grass.😢 We didn't have shade at all.
Can be noisy sometimes do to the airport close by.

We've spend a day on Magnetic Island, and to get to the port and come back we use the bus from outside the Caravan Park!

Fix the hot water in the shower block
Paint some dam numbers/letters on the ground
Fix the kitchen oven

Dynamic pricing? You guys are to expensive

Reception staff.. Especially the female was completely disinterested

Her words "this is completely bellow my pay grade"

What a shame

Ein schöner Campingplatz in guter Lage, Strasse zwischen Platz und Strand. Man kann an der Promenade entlang laufen. Die Stadt selber ist nicht so spektakulär aber für eine Nacht war es gut. Sanitäre Einrichtungen waren gut, Stellplätze gross genug, gut besucht, such im australischen Winter, wir waren Mitte August.

To start, booked and paid full amount by direct deposit to save credit card fees.  Was then charged for the full amount again, including credit card fees.|Called up to explain the double charge, and was reimbursed the lesser amount excluding the card fees.   Called again and advised that I had already paid to avoid card fees, and that the refund due is the gross amount inclusive of card fees.  Cheeky, but was only refunded the proper amount after two phone calls|2. Park management severely lacking in customer care and service.  There seems to be a really bad culture with the staff, as they are surly, most occasions rude, and not a pleasant welcome nor pleasant experience going to the front office.|3.  Upon arrival to check-in at 1.33pm - was told to come back in 27 minutes and then they would be ready to check in and not before.|4. Office member was unwelcoming and surly.  A real bad start to a long stay holiday.|5.
